inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar hai, thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, sir dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, and headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although less likely, gastroenteritis can also present with similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid is less likely at this stage, but cannot be ruled out without further evaluation

inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are concerning for typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the progression of symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are classic signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis is less likely given the severity of symptoms and the presence of a rash

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is possible but less likely given the absence of other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi tak hai, pet dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of symptoms and the development of jaundice confirm the diagnosis of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the severity and duration of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of specific symptoms and the presence of jaundice
